untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct measurement of order flow dominance (53% threshold) and bid-ask spread widening (>15%), neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set. vol_ratio_20 and price_pos_20 are proxies but do not directly capture order flow asymmetry or spread dynamics. ATR could approximate spread changes but is not a direct spread measurement.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using vol_ratio_20 (volume asymmetry as proxy for order flow dominance) and price_pos_20 (price deviation from 20-period MA normalized by volatility). Bid-ask spread widening condition cannot be translated without explicit spread data. The signal is fundamentally about market microstructure mechanics (dealer inventory adjustment, adverse selection) that require tick-level or L2 order book data not available in standard OHLCV indicators.
